data.title: Cryptocurrency Internet Computer Down More Than 3% Within 24 hours
data.description: Over the past 24 hours, Internet Computer's (CRYPTO: ICP) price has fallen 3.62% to $7.68. This continues its negative trend over the past week where it has experienced a 2.0% loss, moving from $7.86 to its current price.

Firefly Neuroscience And Bright Minds Advance Phase 1 Study With AI-Driven Data Analysis
data.description: Firefly Neuroscience partners with Bright Minds Biosciences to analyze positive Phase 1 data of BMB-101 using advanced AI technology, setting the stage for Phase 2 trials.
